comment: Quiet and spotless, short walk to the buyer's office. Ideal for a two-night trip.
Ute was a wonderful host, super responsive.
Simple, clean, close to the importer in Bloomsbury. Would book again.
Tidy flat, a bit of street noise at night.
Booked for the family ski weekend. Apartment was warm and clean, slopes nearby.
Comfortable single room, walking distance to the Geneva buyer meeting.
Practical B&B room, good breakfast, easy reach to the Hamburg port district.
The cortijo suite at Finca Miles was magical. Soo-Jin welcomed us with fresh olive oil and bread.
Quiet estate surrounded by olive groves. Perfect base for exploring Cordoba.
The olive oil tasting was the highlight of our Andalusia trip. Learned the difference between Picual and Hojiblanca.
Soo-Jin is a fantastic host and the mill tour was fascinating. Bought several bottles of the Miles label.
Lovely double room with a terrace facing the grove. Breakfast with estate honey and oil was wonderful.
Charming stone cottage near Subbetica park. Great hiking nearby, a little remote for those without a car.
Spacious family cortijo with a garden the kids loved. Soo-Jin arranged a grove tour for us.
Sunrise tour with Pedro through the olive trees was unforgettable, followed by a great Andalusian breakfast.
We came for the harvest and got to pick olives ourselves. A true farm experience near Baena.
Cosy loft above the tasting room. Waking up to the smell of fresh olive oil was a treat.
Birdwatcher's cabin was perfect. Maria pointed out so many species over the olive hills.
Simple shepherd's casita with lots of character. Pedro was helpful and friendly.
Stayed at the photography retreat at our own Finca to test it for guests. The light over the groves at dusk is incredible.
